'''Furballs''' were creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kimanan]]. Described as tiny, tubby, clown-ish marsupials, they were commonly kept as pets. [[Sabodor]] and [[Eeksa]] both sold them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] {{Mo}}
*[[Operation: Elrood (book)|''Operation: Elrood'']]
*''[[X-Wing: Starfighters of Adumar]]'' {{Mo}}
